","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/file-upload/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/file-upload/README.md","text":"# file upload > Upload files to /files/ with rename, delete, thumbnails, and deduplication Upload media files to the server's `/files/` directory with automatic tiddler creation, rename, delete, thumbnail generation, and content-hash deduplication. ## Key features * **Drag-and-drop upload** -- `<$file-dropzone>` widget uploads to `/files/` and creates tiddlers with `_canonical_uri` * **Thumbnail generation** -- automatic thumbnails for images and PDFs via ImageMagick (configurable resolution) * **Thumbnail rendering** -- show thumbnails by default with click-to-expand and toolbar toggle * **File rename** -- renaming a tiddler renames the physical file including `_generated/` thumbnails * **File delete** -- deleting a tiddler offers to delete the file including thumbnails * **Deduplication** -- optional global content-hash dedup skips identical uploads ## Prerequisites * ImageMagick -- required for thumbnail generation (`magick` on PATH) * Ghostscript -- additionally required for PDF thumbnails (`gswin64c` on Windows, `gs` on Linux) ## Quick start Drop files onto any `<$file-dropzone>` widget. Configure thumbnail settings and allowed media types in ControlPanel > Settings > file upload. ```html <$file-dropzone actions=""" <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<> _canonical_uri=<> _thumbnail_uri=<> type=<>/> """> Drop files here ``` ## Plugin Library Install from the [rimir plugin library](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-plugin-library/) via *Control Panel → Plugins → Get more plugins*. ## License MIT -- see [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md) ","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/body/thumbnail":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/body/thumbnail","created":"20260305110602313","modified":"20260305110602313","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\define thumb-state() $:/state/file-upload/view-mode/$(currentTiddler)$ <$reveal type="nomatch" state=<> text="full" tag="div" class="fu-thumbnail-wrapper"> <$button class="fu-thumbnail-click" actions="<$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text='full'/>"> <$reveal type="match" state=<> text="full" tag="div" class="fu-full-view"> <$transclude/> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/cascade/thumbnail":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/cascade/thumbnail","created":"20260305110602313","list-before":"$:/config/ViewTemplateBodyFilters/default","modified":"20260305110602313","tags":"$:/tags/ViewTemplateBodyFilter","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"[all[current]has[_thumbnail_uri]then{$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-rendering}match[yes]then[$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/body/thumbnail]]"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/changelog","created":"20260305110602313","modified":"20260305110602313","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Changelog |!Version |!Date |!Changes | |v0.1.6 |2026-03-15 |Add null guards to th-saving-tiddler and th-renaming-tiddler hooks | |v0.1.5 |2026-03-15 |Add name field to plugin.info | |v0.1.4 |2026-03-15 |Add regression tests, CI test gate, and extract helpers library | |v0.1.3 |2026-03-15 |Fix th-deleting-tiddler hook: return tiddler instead of true to preserve hook chain, add null guard for upstream hooks returning undefined | |v0.1.2 |2026-03-12 |Add allowed media types section to settings UI, fix missing media-types config causing all uploads to be rejected (415), fix thumbnail generation failing for filenames with spaces (quote paths in processor commands), update dev-workflow docs | |v0.1.1 |2026-03-06 |Standardize plugin tabs: add documentation/changelog/license to list, replace license.tid with LICENSE.md.meta sidecar | |v0.1.0 |2026 |Initial release | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/architecture","created":"20260305110602313","modified":"20260305110602313","rdt.order":"2","rdt.plugin-key":"file-upload","rdt.plugin-name":"file upload","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Upload files to /files/ with rename, delete, thumbnails, and deduplication","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Data flow !!! Upload # Browser: user drops file onto `<$file-dropzone>` # Widget reads file via `wiki.readFiles()`, base64-encodes content # Widget computes `targetPath` from file-paths filter (or `subfolder` attribute) # Widget performs XHR → `POST /api/file-upload` # Server validates MIME type, checks path traversal, writes file to `/files/` # Server checks thumbnail settings — if enabled for this MIME type, runs ImageMagick via `runner-actions.json` to generate thumbnail in `_generated/` # Server responds with `{canonicalUri, filename, generatedUri?}` # Widget parses response, extracts `canonical-uri` and `generated-uri` as variables # Widget executes `actions` callback — typically creates tiddler with `_canonical_uri` and `_thumbnail_uri` !!! Rename # Browser: user saves tiddler with a new title # `th-saving-tiddler` hook detects title change + `_canonical_uri` on original tiddler # Hook computes new file path from new title (preserving extension) # Synchronous XHR → `POST /api/file-rename` # Server renames file on disk, also renames `_generated/` files # Hook updates `_canonical_uri` on the new tiddler !!! Delete # Browser: user deletes a tiddler with `_canonical_uri` # `th-deleting-tiddler` hook shows confirmation dialog # If confirmed, async XHR → `POST /api/file-delete` # Server deletes file from disk, also deletes `_generated/` files # Server cleans up empty parent directories !! Components |!Component |!Layer |!Role | |`routes/upload.js` |Server |`POST /api/file-upload` — receive base64 file, validate, write to `/files/`, run thumbnail processor | |`routes/rename.js` |Server |`POST /api/file-rename` — rename file on disk (incl. `_generated/`) | |`routes/delete.js` |Server |`POST /api/file-delete` — delete file from disk (incl. `_generated/`) | |`widgets/dropzone.js` |Browser |`<$file-dropzone>` — extends core dropzone, uploads via XHR, passes response variables to actions | |`startup.js` |Browser |Registers `th-saving-tiddler` and `th-deleting-tiddler` hooks | |`cascade-thumbnail.tid` |Browser |ViewTemplateBodyFilter — routes tiddlers with `_thumbnail_uri` to thumbnail body template | |`body-thumbnail.tid` |Browser |Body template — shows thumbnail with click-to-expand, or full-size view | |`toolbar-version-switch.tid` |Browser |ViewToolbar button — toggles between thumbnail and full-size view | |`settings.tid` |Browser |Control Panel → Settings → File Upload | !! Design decisions * ''`th-saving-tiddler` not `th-renaming-tiddler`'' — the editor's save-with-new-title flow uses `addTiddler` + `deleteTiddler`, not `wiki.renameTiddler()`. The `th-saving-tiddler` hook is the only one that fires during editor renames. * ''Synchronous XHR for rename'' — `th-saving-tiddler` must return the (possibly modified) tiddler synchronously. Modern browsers still support sync XHR on the main thread. * ''`bodyFormat: "stream"` for upload'' — base64-encoded files can be large; streaming avoids TW's default body buffering limits. * ''`_generated/` subfolder'' — post-upload processors write derived files (thumbnails) alongside the original. Rename and delete operations also handle `_generated/` files. * ''Path traversal protection'' — all routes verify that resolved paths stay inside the `files/` directory using `path.relative()`. * ''Direct XHR in dropzone widget'' — uses `$tw.utils.httpRequest` instead of `tm-http-request` so the widget can parse the server response and pass `canonical-uri` and `generated-uri` as action variables automatically. * ''Settings-driven processors'' — thumbnail generation is controlled by config tiddlers (`thumb-images`, `thumb-pdfs`, `thumb-resolution`) read per request, not by the static `processors` tiddler. * ''ViewTemplateBodyFilter cascade'' — thumbnail rendering hooks into TW's body cascade so it runs before the default template. Only activates when the tiddler has `_thumbnail_uri` and thumb-rendering is enabled. * ''`$:/state/` for view toggle'' — thumbnail/full-size state uses `$:/state/file-upload/view-mode/` (memory-only, not persisted). <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body"> The rename and delete routes operate on `/files/`, not `tiddlers/`. The filesystem-watcher plugin watches `tiddlers/` only, so there is no conflict or write-lock needed. </$fill> </$transclude> !! Security model * MIME type whitelist — only types listed in `$:/config/rimir/file-upload/media-types` are accepted (checked both client-side and server-side) * Path traversal — `path.relative(basePath, resolved)` must not start with `..` * CSRF — all POST routes require `X-Requested-With: TiddlyWiki` header * File conflict — rename returns 409 if the target file already exists </$fill> </$transclude>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/dev-workflow":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/dev-workflow","created":"20260305110602314","modified":"20260305110602314","rdt.order":"3","rdt.plugin-key":"file-upload","rdt.plugin-name":"file upload","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Upload files to /files/ with rename, delete, thumbnails, and deduplication","rdt.section":"Dev Workflow","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Plugin files |!File |!Type |!Role | |`plugin.info` |metadata |Plugin metadata | |`routes/upload.js` |`route` |`POST /api/file-upload` — receive base64 file, write to `/files/`, run thumbnail processor | |`routes/rename.js` |`route` |`POST /api/file-rename` — rename file on disk (incl. `_generated/`) | |`routes/delete.js` |`route` |`POST /api/file-delete` — delete file from disk (incl. `_generated/`) | |`widgets/dropzone.js` |`widget` |`<$file-dropzone>` — extends core dropzone, uploads via XHR | |`startup.js` |`startup` |Browser-side: registers `th-saving-tiddler` and `th-deleting-tiddler` hooks | |`settings.tid` |UI |Control Panel → Settings → File Upload (thumbnails, media types, dedup) | |`cascade-thumbnail.tid` |cascade |ViewTemplateBodyFilter — routes to thumbnail body template | |`body-thumbnail.tid` |template |Body template: thumbnail with click-to-expand | |`toolbar-version-switch.tid` |toolbar |ViewToolbar button: toggle thumbnail/full-size | |`toolbar-version-switch-visibility.tid` |config |Makes toolbar button visible by default | |`icon-expand.tid` |icon |Expand SVG icon | |`icon-shrink.tid` |icon |Shrink SVG icon | |`styles-thumbnail.tid` |stylesheet |CSS for thumbnail wrapper, full-view embed sizing | |`readme.tid` |doc |Plugin readme | !! Wiki config tiddlers These are ''not'' bundled in the plugin — they live in the wiki's tiddler store and are created via the settings UI or manually. All are read per request (no restart needed). |!Tiddler |!Type |!Role | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/media-types` |JSON array |Allowed MIME types for upload | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-images` |`yes`/`no` |Enable image thumbnail generation | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-pdfs` |`yes`/`no` |Enable PDF thumbnail generation | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-resolution` |string |Thumbnail max dimension (e.g. `200` or `300x200`) | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-rendering` |`yes`/`no` |Show thumbnails by default | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/global-dedup` |`yes`/`no` |Global content-hash deduplication | !! Restart rules |!Change |!Restart needed? | |Edit wiki config tiddlers (media-types, thumb-*, global-dedup) |No — read from `$tw.wiki` per request | |Edit `runner-actions.json` |No for upload.js (reads per request) — Yes for runner plugin | |Edit `.tid` files (settings, styles, templates) |No — plugin tiddlers reload on restart, but config changes via UI take effect immediately | |Edit any `.js` module |Yes — JS modules load at boot | <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip"> <$fill $name="body"> On Windows, use `taskkill //F //PID <pid> //T` to kill the server before restarting. </$fill> </$transclude> !! API reference !!! POST /api/file-upload Request: ```json { "filename": "photo.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "content": "<base64>", "targetPath": "images/photo.jpg" } ``` Response (200): ```json { "canonicalUri": "/files/images/photo.jpg", "filename": "photo.jpg", "generatedUri": "/files/images/_generated/photo_thumb.jpg" } ``` |!Status |!Meaning | |200 |File uploaded successfully | |400 |Missing fields or invalid JSON | |403 |Path traversal detected | |413 |Upload too large (>50MB JSON) | |415 |MIME type not in whitelist | !!! POST /api/file-rename Request: ```json {"oldUri": "/files/images/old.jpg", "newUri": "/files/images/new.jpg"} ``` |!Status |!Meaning | |200 |File renamed, returns `{newCanonicalUri}` | |404 |Source file not found | |409 |Target file already exists | !!! POST /api/file-delete Request: ```json {"uri": "/files/images/photo.jpg"} ``` |!Status |!Meaning | |200 |File deleted, returns `{deleted: true}` | |404 |File not found | !! Configuration !!! Media types Edit `$:/config/rimir/file-upload/media-types` (JSON array) to add or remove allowed MIME types. Changes take effect immediately (no restart needed). !!! File paths filter `$:/config/rimir/file-upload/file-paths` is a TW filter that computes the target path under `/files/`. The temp tiddler's fields are available as input: `filename` (original name) and `type` (MIME type). Default: ``` [get[upload-folder]addsuffix[/]addsuffix{!!filename}] [get[type]prefix[image/]then[images/]addsuffix{!!filename}] [get[type]match[application/pdf]then[pdf/]addsuffix{!!filename}] [get[filename]] ``` Filter steps (first match wins): # If `upload-folder` is set (via `prop-upload-folder` on the widget), use `<upload-folder>/<filename>` # If type starts with `image/` → `images/<filename>` # If type is `application/pdf` → `pdf/<filename>` # Fallback: just `<filename>` (root of `/files/`) The `subfolder` attribute on `<$file-dropzone>` overrides this filter entirely if set. !!! Thumbnails Controlled via Settings UI (Control Panel → Settings → File Upload) or config tiddlers: |!Tiddler |!Default |!Purpose | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-images` |`no` |Generate thumbnails for images | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-pdfs` |`no` |Generate PDF first-page thumbnails (requires Ghostscript) | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-resolution` |`200` |Max dimension: `200` (single) or `300x200` (WxH) | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-rendering` |`no` |Show thumbnails instead of full-size by default | Thumbnail generation uses ImageMagick via `runner-actions.json`: * `thumb-image`: `magick {{input}} -thumbnail "{{resolution}}>" {{output}}` * `thumb-pdf`: `magick {{input}}[0] -thumbnail "{{resolution}}>" {{output}}` (first page → PNG) Generated files go to `_generated/<basename>_thumb.<ext>` alongside the original. <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="warning"> <$fill $name="body"> PDF thumbnails require both ImageMagick and Ghostscript on the server's `PATH`. ImageMagick delegates PDF rasterisation to Ghostscript automatically (`gs` on Linux, `gswin64c` on Windows). </$fill> </$transclude> !!! Deduplication `$:/config/rimir/file-upload/global-dedup` (`yes`/`no`) — when enabled, the widget computes a content hash before upload and skips if an identical file already exists. !! Widget reference !!! `<$file-dropzone>` |!Attribute |!Description | |`actions` |Action string executed on upload completion | |`subfolder` |Optional subfolder override (bypasses filter) | |`prop-*` |Extra fields passed through as action variables | Action variables available in `actions`: |!Variable |!Description | |`<<data>>` |Raw JSON response body | |`<<type>>` |MIME type of uploaded file | |`<<filename>>` |Original filename | |`<<content-hash>>` |Content hash (8-char hex) | |`<<canonical-uri>>` |Canonical URI of uploaded file (e.g. `/files/images/photo.jpg`) | |`<<generated-uri>>` |Thumbnail URI if processor ran (e.g. `/files/images/_generated/photo_thumb.jpg`), empty otherwise | </$fill> </$transclude>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/examples","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"4","rdt.plugin-key":"file-upload","rdt.plugin-name":"file upload","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Upload files to /files/ with rename, delete, thumbnails, and deduplication","rdt.section":"Examples","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Basic dropzone with tiddler creation ``` <$file-dropzone actions=""" <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<<filename>> _canonical_uri=<<canonical-uri>> _thumbnail_uri=<<generated-uri>> _content_hash=<<content-hash>> type=<<type>> /> """> Drop files here </$file-dropzone> ``` This creates a tiddler named after the file, with `_canonical_uri` pointing to the uploaded file on disk. If thumbnail generation is enabled, `_thumbnail_uri` points to the generated thumbnail. !! Dropzone with custom tags and subfolder ``` <$file-dropzone subfolder="project-assets" actions=""" <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<<filename>> _canonical_uri=<<canonical-uri>> tags="asset project" type=<<type>> /> """> Drop project assets here </$file-dropzone> ``` The `subfolder` attribute overrides the file-paths filter and places all uploads in `/files/project-assets/`. </$fill> </$transclude> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/faq":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/faq","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"5","rdt.plugin-key":"file-upload","rdt.plugin-name":"file upload","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Upload files to /files/ with rename, delete, thumbnails, and deduplication","rdt.section":"FAQ","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Q: Why does thumbnail generation fail for PDFs? PDF thumbnails require both ImageMagick and Ghostscript installed on the server's PATH. ImageMagick delegates PDF rasterisation to Ghostscript (`gs` on Linux, `gswin64c` on Windows). Verify both are installed and accessible from the command line. !! Q: I renamed a tiddler but the file on disk wasn't renamed. Why? The rename hook triggers on `th-saving-tiddler`, which fires during editor save-with-new-title (the standard rename flow). If you used `$action-setfield` or direct wiki manipulation to change the title, the hook does not fire. Rename only works through the editor's built-in rename mechanism. !! Q: Can I upload files larger than 50MB? The upload route rejects JSON bodies larger than 50MB (the file is base64-encoded in the JSON payload, so the effective file size limit is roughly 37MB). This limit is hardcoded in the route handler to prevent memory issues. For larger files, upload them directly to the `/files/` directory on disk and create tiddlers with `_canonical_uri` manually. </$fill> </$transclude> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/overview","created":"20260305110602314","modified":"20260305110602314","rdt.hub-category":"tools","rdt.hub-category-name":"Tools","rdt.hub-order":"4","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"file-upload","rdt.plugin-name":"file upload","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Upload files to /files/ with rename, delete, thumbnails, and deduplication","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! What it does Upload media files to the server's `/files/` directory and create tiddlers with `_canonical_uri`. When a tiddler is renamed or deleted, the physical file on disk follows automatically. !! Features * ''Upload'' — drop files onto `<$file-dropzone>`, uploads to `/files/`, creates tiddler with `_canonical_uri` * ''Thumbnails'' — automatic thumbnail generation for images and PDFs via ImageMagick (configurable resolution) * ''Thumbnail rendering'' — show thumbnails instead of full-size files by default, with click-to-expand and toolbar toggle * ''Rename'' — renaming a tiddler renames the file on disk (including `_generated/` thumbnails) and updates `_canonical_uri` * ''Delete'' — deleting a tiddler offers to delete the file from disk (including `_generated/` thumbnails) * ''Deduplication'' — optional global content-hash dedup skips uploads of identical files * ''Path filter'' — target path computed via configurable TW filter * ''MIME whitelist'' — only allowed file types can be uploaded * ''Settings UI'' — Control Panel → Settings → File Upload for all configuration !! Quick start Add a dropzone to any tiddler: ``` <$file-dropzone actions=""" <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<<filename>> _canonical_uri=<<canonical-uri>> _thumbnail_uri=<<generated-uri>> _content_hash=<<content-hash>> type=<<type>> /> """> Drop files here </$file-dropzone> ``` Drop a file → the file-paths filter routes it to the right subfolder: images to `files/images/`, PDFs to `files/pdf/`. A tiddler is created with `_canonical_uri`. If thumbnails are enabled, `_thumbnail_uri` points to the generated thumbnail in `_generated/`. Use the [[test tab|$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test]] in the plugin detail view to try it out. </$fill> </$transclude>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/reference":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/reference","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"6","rdt.plugin-key":"file-upload","rdt.plugin-name":"file upload","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Upload files to /files/ with rename, delete, thumbnails, and deduplication","rdt.section":"Reference","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Widget: `<$file-dropzone>` |!Attribute |!Description | |`actions` |Action string executed on upload completion | |`subfolder` |Optional subfolder override (bypasses file-paths filter) | |`prop-*` |Extra fields passed through as action variables | Action variables available in `actions`: |!Variable |!Description | |`<<data>>` |Raw JSON response body | |`<<type>>` |MIME type of uploaded file | |`<<filename>>` |Original filename | |`<<content-hash>>` |Content hash (8-char hex) | |`<<canonical-uri>>` |Canonical URI of the uploaded file (e.g. `/files/images/photo.jpg`) | |`<<generated-uri>>` |Thumbnail URI if processor ran, empty otherwise | !! Server routes !!! POST /api/file-upload |!Request field |!Description | |`filename` |Original filename | |`type` |MIME type | |`content` |Base64-encoded file content | |`targetPath` |Computed target path under `/files/` | |!Status |!Meaning | |200 |Success — returns `{canonicalUri, filename, generatedUri?}` | |400 |Missing fields or invalid JSON | |403 |Path traversal detected | |413 |Upload too large (>50MB JSON) | |415 |MIME type not in whitelist | !!! POST /api/file-rename |!Request field |!Description | |`oldUri` |Current canonical URI | |`newUri` |Desired canonical URI | |!Status |!Meaning | |200 |Success — returns `{newCanonicalUri}` | |404 |Source file not found | |409 |Target file already exists | !!! POST /api/file-delete |!Request field |!Description | |`uri` |Canonical URI to delete | |!Status |!Meaning | |200 |Success — returns `{deleted: true}` | |404 |File not found | !! Config tiddlers |!Tiddler |!Default |!Description | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/media-types` |JSON array |Allowed MIME types for upload | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-images` |`no` |Enable image thumbnail generation | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-pdfs` |`no` |Enable PDF thumbnail generation | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-resolution` |`200` |Thumbnail max dimension | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-rendering` |`no` |Show thumbnails by default in view mode | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/global-dedup` |`no` |Global content-hash deduplication | |`$:/config/rimir/file-upload/file-paths` |filter |TW filter computing target path under `/files/` | </$fill> </$transclude> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/tw-internals":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/tw-internals","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"7","rdt.plugin-key":"file-upload","rdt.plugin-name":"file upload","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Upload files to /files/ with rename, delete, thumbnails, and deduplication","rdt.section":"TW Internals","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! th-saving-tiddler hook Used by `startup.js` to intercept tiddler renames. When a tiddler with `_canonical_uri` is saved with a different title than `draft.of`, the hook sends a synchronous XHR to the rename route and updates `_canonical_uri` on the new tiddler. The hook must return the (possibly modified) tiddler synchronously. !! th-deleting-tiddler hook Intercepts tiddler deletion. If the tiddler has `_canonical_uri`, shows a confirmation dialog asking whether to also delete the file on disk. If confirmed, sends an async XHR to the delete route. !! $tw.utils.httpRequest The `<$file-dropzone>` widget uses `$tw.utils.httpRequest` (TiddlyWiki's built-in XHR wrapper) instead of the `tm-http-request` message. This allows the widget to parse the JSON response directly and extract `canonical-uri` and `generated-uri` as variables for the `actions` callback. The `tm-http-request` message does not provide response parsing hooks. !! ViewTemplateBodyFilter cascade `cascade-thumbnail.tid` is tagged `$:/tags/ViewTemplateBodyFilter`. TiddlyWiki evaluates body filters in order — the first to return a non-empty result determines which body template renders the tiddler. The thumbnail cascade checks for `_thumbnail_uri` and enabled thumb-rendering config, routing matching tiddlers to `body-thumbnail.tid`. !! module-type: route The upload, rename, and delete JS files use `module-type: route`, which TiddlyWiki's server framework discovers at boot and registers as HTTP request handlers. Each route exports `method`, `path` (regex), and `handler`. !! bodyFormat: "stream" The upload route sets `bodyFormat: "stream"` to prevent TiddlyWiki's server from buffering the entire request body into memory before calling the handler. Base64-encoded files can be large, so streaming avoids default body size limits. </$fill> </$transclude> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/documentation","created":"20260305110602315","modified":"20260305110602315","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %> <$tiddler tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/overview"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/doc/overview"/> </$tiddler> --- !! Try it out <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test"/> <%else%> To display this documentation, the plugin [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]] needs to be installed. See the [[readme|$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/readme]] tab for a basic overview. <%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/helpers":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/helpers","text":"/*\ title: $:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/helpers type: application/javascript module-type: library Pure utility functions for file-upload plugin. Extracted from startup.js for testability. \*/ "use strict"; // Route files to subfolders by MIME type function getSubfolderForType(mimeType) { if(mimeType.indexOf("image/") === 0) { return "images"; } if(mimeType === "application/pdf") { return "pdf"; } return ""; } function sanitizePath(p) { p = p.replace(/\\/g, "/"); if(p.charAt(0) === "/") { p = p.substring(1); } return p; } function computeFilePath(tiddlerFields, oldUri) { // Extract extension from old URI, derive new filename from tiddler title var oldFilename = oldUri.substring(oldUri.lastIndexOf("/") + 1); var extDot = oldFilename.lastIndexOf("."); var ext = extDot >= 0 ? oldFilename.substring(extDot) : ""; // New filename = tiddler title + original extension (title may already have ext) var newTitle = tiddlerFields.title; var filename = newTitle.toLowerCase().endsWith(ext.toLowerCase()) ? newTitle : newTitle + ext; // Route by MIME type var type = tiddlerFields.type || ""; var subfolder = getSubfolderForType(type); if(subfolder) { return sanitizePath(subfolder + "/" + filename); } return sanitizePath(filename); } // Compute new thumbnail URI from new canonical URI, preserving thumbnail extension function computeThumbnailUri(newCanonicalUri, oldThumbnailUri) { // Extract thumbnail extension from old URI (e.g. ".png" for PDF thumbnails) var oldThumbFilename = oldThumbnailUri.substring(oldThumbnailUri.lastIndexOf("/") + 1); var thumbSuffixStart = oldThumbFilename.indexOf("_thumb"); var thumbSuffix = thumbSuffixStart >= 0 ? oldThumbFilename.substring(thumbSuffixStart) : "_thumb" + oldThumbFilename.substring(oldThumbFilename.lastIndexOf(".")); // Build new thumbnail URI from new canonical URI var lastSlash = newCanonicalUri.lastIndexOf("/"); var dir = newCanonicalUri.substring(0, lastSlash); var newFilename = newCanonicalUri.substring(lastSlash + 1); var dotPos = newFilename.lastIndexOf("."); var baseName = dotPos >= 0 ? newFilename.substring(0, dotPos) : newFilename; return dir + "/_generated/" + baseName + thumbSuffix; } exports.getSubfolderForType = getSubfolderForType; exports.sanitizePath = sanitizePath; exports.computeFilePath = computeFilePath; exports.computeThumbnailUri = computeThumbnailUri; text=<<skipped-list>>/>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/readme","created":"20260305110602316","modified":"20260305110602316","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! file upload Upload media files to the server's `/files/` directory with automatic tiddler creation, rename, delete, thumbnail generation, and content-hash deduplication. !! Key features * ''Drag-and-drop upload'' — `<$file-dropzone>` widget uploads to `/files/` and creates tiddlers with `_canonical_uri` * ''Thumbnail generation'' — automatic thumbnails for images and PDFs via ImageMagick (configurable resolution) * ''Thumbnail rendering'' — show thumbnails by default with click-to-expand and toolbar toggle * ''File rename'' — renaming a tiddler renames the physical file including `_generated/` thumbnails * ''File delete'' — deleting a tiddler offers to delete the file including thumbnails * ''Deduplication'' — optional global content-hash dedup skips identical uploads !! Prerequisites * ImageMagick — required for thumbnail generation (`magick` on PATH) * Ghostscript — additionally required for PDF thumbnails (`gswin64c` on Windows, `gs` on Linux) !! Quick start Drop files onto any `<$file-dropzone>` widget. Configure thumbnail settings and allowed media types in ControlPanel > Settings > file upload. ``` <$file-dropzone actions=""" <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<<filename>> _canonical_uri=<<canonical-uri>> _thumbnail_uri=<<generated-uri>> type=<<type>>/> """> Drop files here </$file-dropzone> ``` "},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/delete":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/delete","text":"/*\ title: $:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/delete type: application/javascript module-type: route POST /api/file-delete — delete a file from disk under /files/. Also deletes matching files in _generated/ subdirectory. \*/ "use strict"; var fs = require("fs"); var path = require("path"); var logger = new $tw.utils.Logger("file-upload", {colour: "cyan"}); var basePath = path.resolve($tw.boot.wikiPath, "files"); exports.method = "POST"; exports.path = /^\/api\/file-delete$/; exports.handler = function(request, response, state) { var data; try { data = JSON.parse(state.data); } catch(e) { sendJson(response, 400, {error: "Invalid JSON body"}); return; } var uri = data.uri; if(!uri) { sendJson(response, 400, {error: "Missing required field: uri"}); return; } // Strip /files/ prefix if(uri.indexOf("/files/") !== 0) { sendJson(response, 400, {error: "URI must start with /files/"}); return; } var relPath = uri.substring(7); var filePath = path.resolve(basePath, relPath); // Security check if(path.relative(basePath, filePath).indexOf("..") === 0) { sendJson(response, 403, {error: "Path traversal not allowed"}); return; } // Check file exists if(!fs.existsSync(filePath)) { sendJson(response, 404, {error: "File not found: " + uri}); return; } // Delete the file try { fs.unlinkSync(filePath); } catch(e) { logger.log("Delete failed: " + e.message); sendJson(response, 500, {error: "Delete failed: " + e.message}); return; } // Delete matching _generated/ files deleteGenerated(filePath); // Clean up empty parent directories cleanEmptyDirs(path.dirname(filePath)); logger.log("Deleted: " + uri); sendJson(response, 200, {deleted: true}); }; function deleteGenerated(filePath) { var parsed = path.parse(filePath); var genDir = path.join(parsed.dir, "_generated"); if(!fs.existsSync(genDir)) { return; } try { var files = fs.readdirSync(genDir); var prefix = parsed.name; for(var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) { if(files[i].indexOf(prefix) === 0) { fs.unlinkSync(path.join(genDir, files[i])); } } // Clean up _generated/ if empty var remaining = fs.readdirSync(genDir); if(remaining.length === 0) { fs.rmdirSync(genDir); } } catch(e) { logger.log("Generated file delete error: " + e.message); } } function cleanEmptyDirs(dirPath) { while(dirPath !== basePath && dirPath.length > basePath.length) { try { var entries = fs.readdirSync(dirPath); if(entries.length === 0) { fs.rmdirSync(dirPath); dirPath = path.dirname(dirPath); } else { break; } } catch(e) { break; } } } function sendJson(response, statusCode, data) { var body = JSON.stringify(data); response.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json", "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*" }); response.end(body); } ","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"route","created":"20260305110602316","modified":"20260305110602316"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/rename":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/rename","text":"/*\ title: $:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/rename type: application/javascript module-type: route POST /api/file-rename — rename a file on disk under /files/. Also renames matching files in _generated/ subdirectory. \*/ "use strict"; var fs = require("fs"); var path = require("path"); var logger = new $tw.utils.Logger("file-upload", {colour: "cyan"}); var basePath = path.resolve($tw.boot.wikiPath, "files"); exports.method = "POST"; exports.path = /^\/api\/file-rename$/; exports.handler = function(request, response, state) { var data; try { data = JSON.parse(state.data); } catch(e) { sendJson(response, 400, {error: "Invalid JSON body"}); return; } var oldUri = data.oldUri; var newUri = data.newUri; if(!oldUri || !newUri) { sendJson(response, 400, {error: "Missing required fields: oldUri, newUri"}); return; } // Strip /files/ prefix to get relative paths var oldRel = stripFilesPrefix(oldUri); var newRel = stripFilesPrefix(newUri); if(oldRel === null || newRel === null) { sendJson(response, 400, {error: "URIs must start with /files/"}); return; } var oldPath = path.resolve(basePath, oldRel); var newPath = path.resolve(basePath, newRel); // Security check: both must be inside /files/ if(isOutside(oldPath) || isOutside(newPath)) { sendJson(response, 403, {error: "Path traversal not allowed"}); return; } // Check source exists if(!fs.existsSync(oldPath)) { sendJson(response, 404, {error: "Source file not found: " + oldUri}); return; } // Check target doesn't already exist if(fs.existsSync(newPath)) { sendJson(response, 409, {error: "Target file already exists: " + newUri}); return; } // Create target directory and rename $tw.utils.createDirectory(path.dirname(newPath)); try { fs.renameSync(oldPath, newPath); } catch(e) { logger.log("Rename failed: " + e.message); sendJson(response, 500, {error: "Rename failed: " + e.message}); return; } // Clean up empty parent directories of old path cleanEmptyDirs(path.dirname(oldPath)); // Rename matching _generated/ files renameGenerated(oldPath, newPath); logger.log("Renamed: " + oldUri + " -> " + newUri); sendJson(response, 200, {newCanonicalUri: newUri}); }; function renameGenerated(oldFilePath, newFilePath) { var oldParsed = path.parse(oldFilePath); var newParsed = path.parse(newFilePath); var oldGenDir = path.join(oldParsed.dir, "_generated"); var newGenDir = path.join(newParsed.dir, "_generated"); if(!fs.existsSync(oldGenDir)) { return; } try { var files = fs.readdirSync(oldGenDir); var prefix = oldParsed.name; for(var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) { if(files[i].indexOf(prefix) === 0) { var suffix = files[i].substring(prefix.length); var newName = newParsed.name + suffix; $tw.utils.createDirectory(newGenDir); fs.renameSync( path.join(oldGenDir, files[i]), path.join(newGenDir, newName) ); } } // Clean up old _generated/ if empty cleanEmptyDirs(oldGenDir); } catch(e) { logger.log("Generated file rename error: " + e.message); } } function stripFilesPrefix(uri) { if(uri.indexOf("/files/") === 0) { return uri.substring(7); } return null; } function isOutside(resolved) { return path.relative(basePath, resolved).indexOf("..") === 0; } function cleanEmptyDirs(dirPath) { // Walk up from dirPath toward basePath, removing empty directories while(dirPath !== basePath && dirPath.length > basePath.length) { try { var entries = fs.readdirSync(dirPath); if(entries.length === 0) { fs.rmdirSync(dirPath); dirPath = path.dirname(dirPath); } else { break; } } catch(e) { break; } } } function sendJson(response, statusCode, data) { var body = JSON.stringify(data); response.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json", "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*" }); response.end(body); } ","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"route","created":"20260305110602316","modified":"20260305110602316"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/upload":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/upload","text":"/*\ title: $:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/routes/upload type: application/javascript module-type: route POST /api/file-upload — receive base64-encoded file, write to /files/<targetPath>. Optionally runs post-upload processing (thumbnails etc.) via runner actions. \*/ "use strict"; var fs = require("fs"); var path = require("path"); var child_process = require("child_process"); var logger = new $tw.utils.Logger("file-upload", {colour: "cyan"}); var basePath = path.resolve($tw.boot.wikiPath, "files"); exports.method = "POST"; exports.path = /^\/api\/file-upload$/; exports.bodyFormat = "stream"; exports.handler = function(request, response, state) { // Stream the body to handle large base64 payloads var body = ""; request.on("data", function(chunk) { body += chunk; // Limit to 50MB of JSON (base64 expands ~33%, so ~37MB file) if(body.length > 50e6) { sendJson(response, 413, {error: "Upload too large"}); request.connection.destroy(); } }); request.on("end", function() { var data; try { data = JSON.parse(body); } catch(e) { sendJson(response, 400, {error: "Invalid JSON body"}); return; } handleUpload(data, response); }); }; function handleUpload(data, response) { var filename = data.filename; var type = data.type || ""; var content = data.content; var targetPath = data.targetPath; if(!filename || !content || !targetPath) { sendJson(response, 400, {error: "Missing required fields: filename, content, targetPath"}); return; } // Validate MIME type against allowed list var allowedTypes = getAllowedTypes(); if(allowedTypes.indexOf(type) === -1) { sendJson(response, 415, {error: "MIME type not allowed: " + type}); return; } // Resolve and security-check the target path var resolved = path.resolve(basePath, targetPath); if(path.relative(basePath, resolved).indexOf("..") === 0) { sendJson(response, 403, {error: "Path traversal not allowed"}); return; } // Create subdirectories and write file $tw.utils.createDirectory(path.dirname(resolved)); var buf = Buffer.from(content, "base64"); fs.writeFile(resolved, buf, function(err) { if(err) { logger.log("Write error: " + err.message); sendJson(response, 500, {error: "Failed to write file: " + err.message}); return; } var canonicalUri = "/files/" + targetPath.replace(/\\/g, "/"); var result = {canonicalUri: canonicalUri, filename: filename}; // Post-upload processing runProcessor(type, resolved, canonicalUri, function(generatedUri) { if(generatedUri) { result.generatedUri = generatedUri; } sendJson(response, 200, result); }); }); } function getAllowedTypes() { var tiddler = $tw.wiki.getTiddler("$:/config/rimir/file-upload/media-types"); if(tiddler) { try { return JSON.parse(tiddler.fields.text); } catch(e) { logger.log("Failed to parse media-types config: " + e.message); } } return []; } function getProcessorRule(mimeType) { if(mimeType.indexOf("image/") === 0) { var imgTiddler = $tw.wiki.getTiddler("$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-images"); if(imgTiddler && imgTiddler.fields.text === "yes") { return {action: "thumb-image", outputExt: null}; } } if(mimeType === "application/pdf") { var pdfTiddler = $tw.wiki.getTiddler("$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-pdfs"); if(pdfTiddler && pdfTiddler.fields.text === "yes") { return {action: "thumb-pdf", outputExt: ".png"}; } } return null; } function getResolution() { var tiddler = $tw.wiki.getTiddler("$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-resolution"); var raw = (tiddler && tiddler.fields.text || "200").trim(); // If single number, convert to NxN for ImageMagick if(/^\d+$/.test(raw)) { return raw + "x" + raw; } return raw; } function runProcessor(mimeType, inputPath, canonicalUri, callback) { var rule = getProcessorRule(mimeType); if(!rule) { callback(null); return; } // Load runner actions config var actionsPath = path.resolve($tw.boot.wikiPath, "runner-actions.json"); var actions; try { actions = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(actionsPath, "utf8")); } catch(e) { logger.log("Cannot read runner-actions.json: " + e.message); callback(null); return; } var actionDef = actions[rule.action]; if(!actionDef || !actionDef.command) { logger.log("Runner action not found: " + rule.action); callback(null); return; } // Compute output path: <parentDir>/_generated/<basename>_thumb.<ext> var parsed = path.parse(inputPath); var generatedDir = path.join(parsed.dir, "_generated"); $tw.utils.createDirectory(generatedDir); var outputExt = rule.outputExt || parsed.ext; var outputPath = path.join(generatedDir, parsed.name + "_thumb" + outputExt); // Substitute parameters var resolution = getResolution(); var command = actionDef.command; command = command.split("{{input}}").join('"' + inputPath + '"'); command = command.split("{{output}}").join('"' + outputPath + '"'); command = command.split("{{resolution}}").join(resolution); // Execute child_process.exec(command, function(err, stdout, stderr) { if(err) { logger.log("Processor '" + rule.action + "' failed: " + err.message); if(stderr) { logger.log("stderr: " + stderr); } callback(null); } else { // Compute generated canonical URI var relPath = path.relative(basePath, outputPath).replace(/\\/g, "/"); callback("/files/" + relPath); } }); } function sendJson(response, statusCode, data) { var body = JSON.stringify(data); response.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json", "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*" }); response.end(body); } ","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"route","created":"20260305110602316","modified":"20260305110602316"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/settings","created":"20260305110602317","modified":"20260305110602317","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"!! Thumbnails <div class="rr-input-row"> <$checkbox tiddler="$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-images" field="text" checked="yes" unchecked="no" default="no"> Generate thumbnails for images</$checkbox> </div> <div class="rr-input-row"> <$checkbox tiddler="$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-pdfs" field="text" checked="yes" unchecked="no" default="no"> Generate thumbnails for PDFs <span class="rr-muted">(first page, requires Ghostscript)</span></$checkbox> </div> <div class="rr-input-row"> Resolution (max dimension): <$edit-text tiddler="$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-resolution" tag="input" default="200" class="rr-input" size="10"/> <span class="rr-muted">e.g. `200` or `300x200`</span> </div> !! Rendering <div class="rr-input-row"> <$checkbox tiddler="$:/config/rimir/file-upload/thumb-rendering" field="text" checked="yes" unchecked="no" default="no"> Show thumbnails instead of full-size images by default <span class="rr-muted">(tiddlers with `_thumbnail_uri`)</span></$checkbox> </div> !! Allowed media types <div class="rr-input-row"> <span class="rr-muted">JSON array of MIME types accepted for upload. Changes take effect immediately.</span> </div> <$edit-text tiddler="$:/config/rimir/file-upload/media-types" tag="textarea" class="rr-input" rows="6" default='["image/jpeg","image/png","image/gif","image/webp","image/svg+xml","application/pdf"]'/> !! Deduplication <div class="rr-input-row"> <$checkbox tiddler="$:/config/rimir/file-upload/global-dedup" field="text" checked="yes" unchecked="no" default="no"> Enable global content-hash deduplication <span class="rr-muted">(skip upload if identical file already exists)</span></$checkbox> </div>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/startup":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/startup","text":"/*\ title: $:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/startup type: application/javascript module-type: startup Browser-side startup module that registers th-saving-tiddler and th-deleting-tiddler hooks to sync file operations with the server. \*/ "use strict"; var helpers = require("$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/helpers"); var computeFilePath = helpers.computeFilePath; var computeThumbnailUri = helpers.computeThumbnailUri; exports.name = "file-upload-hooks"; exports.after = ["render"]; exports.platforms = ["browser"]; exports.synchronous = true; exports.startup = function() { // --- Save hook (handles rename) --- // When a tiddler is saved with a different title, the editor calls // th-saving-tiddler (not th-renaming-tiddler). We detect the rename // by comparing draft.of with the new title, then rename the file. $tw.hooks.addHook("th-saving-tiddler", function(newTiddler, draftTiddler) { if(!newTiddler || !draftTiddler) return newTiddler; var draftOf = (draftTiddler.fields["draft.of"] || "").trim(); if(!draftOf || draftOf === newTiddler.fields.title) { return newTiddler; } // It's a rename — check if the original tiddler has _canonical_uri var originalTiddler = $tw.wiki.getTiddler(draftOf); if(!originalTiddler) { return newTiddler; } var oldUri = originalTiddler.fields._canonical_uri; if(!oldUri || oldUri.indexOf("/files/") !== 0) { return newTiddler; } // Compute new path via filter var newPath = computeFilePath(newTiddler.fields, oldUri); var newUri = "/files/" + newPath; if(oldUri === newUri) { return newTiddler; } // Synchronous XHR — th-saving-tiddler must return tiddler synchronously var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open("POST", "/api/file-rename", false); xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json"); xhr.setRequestHeader("X-Requested-With", "TiddlyWiki"); xhr.send(JSON.stringify({oldUri: oldUri, newUri: newUri})); if(xhr.status === 200) { var updates = {_canonical_uri: newUri}; if(originalTiddler.fields._thumbnail_uri) { updates._thumbnail_uri = computeThumbnailUri(newUri, originalTiddler.fields._thumbnail_uri); } return new $tw.Tiddler(newTiddler, updates); } // If rename fails, keep old URI return newTiddler; }); // --- Also keep th-renaming-tiddler for programmatic renames --- $tw.hooks.addHook("th-renaming-tiddler", function(newTiddler, oldTiddler) { if(!newTiddler || !oldTiddler) return newTiddler; var oldUri = oldTiddler.fields._canonical_uri; if(!oldUri || oldUri.indexOf("/files/") !== 0) { return newTiddler; } var newPath = computeFilePath(newTiddler.fields, oldUri); var newUri = "/files/" + newPath; if(oldUri === newUri) { return newTiddler; } var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open("POST", "/api/file-rename", false); xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json"); xhr.setRequestHeader("X-Requested-With", "TiddlyWiki"); xhr.send(JSON.stringify({oldUri: oldUri, newUri: newUri})); if(xhr.status === 200) { var updates = {_canonical_uri: newUri}; if(oldTiddler.fields._thumbnail_uri) { updates._thumbnail_uri = computeThumbnailUri(newUri, oldTiddler.fields._thumbnail_uri); } return new $tw.Tiddler(newTiddler, updates); } return newTiddler; }); // --- Delete hook --- $tw.hooks.addHook("th-deleting-tiddler", function(tiddler) { if(!tiddler) return tiddler; var uri = tiddler.fields._canonical_uri; if(!uri || uri.indexOf("/files/") !== 0) { return tiddler; } if(!confirm("Also delete the file from disk?\n" + uri)) { return tiddler; } // Fire-and-forget async XHR var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open("POST", "/api/file-delete", true); xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json"); xhr.setRequestHeader("X-Requested-With", "TiddlyWiki"); xhr.send(JSON.stringify({uri: uri})); return tiddler; }); }; ","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"startup","created":"20260305110602317","modified":"20260305110602317"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/styles/thumbnail":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/styles/thumbnail","created":"20260305110602317","modified":"20260305110602317","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".fu-thumbnail-wrapper { text-align: center; padding: 8px; } .fu-thumbnail-img { max-width: 100%; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; } .fu-thumbnail-click { background: none; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; } .fu-full-view > embed, .fu-full-view > iframe { width: 100%; height: 600px; }"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test/test-hooks.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test/test-hooks.js","text":"/*\ title: $:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test/test-hooks.js type: application/javascript tags: [[$:/tags/test-spec]] Tests for file-upload helper functions (computeFilePath, computeThumbnailUri, getSubfolderForType, sanitizePath). \*/ "use strict"; describe("file-upload: helpers", function() { var helpers = require("$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/helpers"); describe("getSubfolderForType", function() { it("should return 'images' for image/png", function() { expect(helpers.getSubfolderForType("image/png")).toBe("images"); }); it("should return 'images' for image/jpeg", function() { expect(helpers.getSubfolderForType("image/jpeg")).toBe("images"); }); it("should return 'images' for image/svg+xml", function() { expect(helpers.getSubfolderForType("image/svg+xml")).toBe("images"); }); it("should return 'pdf' for application/pdf", function() { expect(helpers.getSubfolderForType("application/pdf")).toBe("pdf"); }); it("should return empty string for text/plain", function() { expect(helpers.getSubfolderForType("text/plain")).toBe(""); }); it("should return empty string for empty type", function() { expect(helpers.getSubfolderForType("")).toBe(""); }); it("should return empty string for application/json", function() { expect(helpers.getSubfolderForType("application/json")).toBe(""); }); }); describe("sanitizePath", function() { it("should replace backslashes with forward slashes", function() { expect(helpers.sanitizePath("images\\photo.png")).toBe("images/photo.png"); }); it("should strip leading slash", function() { expect(helpers.sanitizePath("/images/photo.png")).toBe("images/photo.png"); }); it("should handle clean paths unchanged", function() { expect(helpers.sanitizePath("images/photo.png")).toBe("images/photo.png"); }); it("should handle both backslashes and leading slash", function() { expect(helpers.sanitizePath("\\images\\photo.png")).toBe("images/photo.png"); }); it("should handle empty string", function() { expect(helpers.sanitizePath("")).toBe(""); }); }); describe("computeFilePath", function() { it("should route images to images/ subfolder", function() { var fields = {title: "vacation", type: "image/png"}; var result = helpers.computeFilePath(fields, "/files/images/old-photo.png"); expect(result).toBe("images/vacation.png"); }); it("should route PDFs to pdf/ subfolder", function() { var fields = {title: "report", type: "application/pdf"}; var result = helpers.computeFilePath(fields, "/files/pdf/old-report.pdf"); expect(result).toBe("pdf/report.pdf"); }); it("should not add subfolder for unknown types", function() { var fields = {title: "data", type: "text/plain"}; var result = helpers.computeFilePath(fields, "/files/old-data.txt"); expect(result).toBe("data.txt"); }); it("should not duplicate extension if title already has it", function() { var fields = {title: "photo.png", type: "image/png"}; var result = helpers.computeFilePath(fields, "/files/images/old.png"); expect(result).toBe("images/photo.png"); }); it("should be case-insensitive when checking extension duplication", function() { var fields = {title: "Photo.PNG", type: "image/png"}; var result = helpers.computeFilePath(fields, "/files/images/old.png"); expect(result).toBe("images/Photo.PNG"); }); it("should handle files without extension in old URI", function() { var fields = {title: "newfile", type: "text/plain"}; var result = helpers.computeFilePath(fields, "/files/oldfile"); expect(result).toBe("newfile"); }); it("should default to empty type if not provided", function() { var fields = {title: "myfile"}; var result = helpers.computeFilePath(fields, "/files/old.dat"); expect(result).toBe("myfile.dat"); }); it("should extract extension from deeply nested old URI", function() { var fields = {title: "renamed", type: "image/jpeg"}; var result = helpers.computeFilePath(fields, "/files/images/sub/dir/original.jpg"); expect(result).toBe("images/renamed.jpg"); }); }); describe("computeThumbnailUri", function() { it("should compute thumbnail URI for image rename", function() { var result = helpers.computeThumbnailUri( "/files/images/new-photo.png", "/files/images/_generated/old-photo_thumb.png" ); expect(result).toBe("/files/images/_generated/new-photo_thumb.png"); }); it("should preserve _thumb suffix with different extension (PDF thumbnails)", function() { var result = helpers.computeThumbnailUri( "/files/pdf/new-report.pdf", "/files/pdf/_generated/old-report_thumb.png" ); expect(result).toBe("/files/pdf/_generated/new-report_thumb.png"); }); it("should handle canonical URI without subdirectory", function() { var result = helpers.computeThumbnailUri( "/files/document.pdf", "/files/_generated/old-doc_thumb.png" ); expect(result).toBe("/files/_generated/document_thumb.png"); }); it("should handle thumbnail with complex suffix", function() { var result = helpers.computeThumbnailUri( "/files/images/new.jpg", "/files/images/_generated/old_thumb.jpg" ); expect(result).toBe("/files/images/_generated/new_thumb.jpg"); }); it("should fallback to _thumb + old extension if no _thumb in old URI", function() { // Edge case: old thumbnail URI without _thumb marker var result = helpers.computeThumbnailUri( "/files/images/new.png", "/files/images/_generated/old.png" ); expect(result).toBe("/files/images/_generated/new_thumb.png"); }); }); }); ","type":"application/javascript","tags":"[[$:/tags/test-spec]]"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info","text":"{ "description": "Test edition for file-upload", "plugins": [ "tiddlywiki/jasmine", "rimir/file-upload" ], "themes": [ "tiddlywiki/vanilla", "tiddlywiki/snowwhite" ] } ","type":".info"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/test","caption":"Test","created":"20260312120000000","modified":"20260312120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"!! Upload test <$file-dropzone actions=""" <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<<filename>> _canonical_uri=<<canonical-uri>> _thumbnail_uri=<<generated-uri>> _content_hash=<<content-hash>> type=<<type>> /> """> <div style="border: 3px dashed #aaa; padding: 40px; text-align: center; border-radius: 8px; background: #f8f8f8;"> ''Drop or paste a file here'' </div> </$file-dropzone> !! Last upload <$list filter="[[$:/temp/file-upload/last-upload]has[text]]" emptyMessage="//No upload yet//"> <pre>{{$:/temp/file-upload/last-upload}}</pre> </$list>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/toolbar/version-switch":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/toolbar/version-switch","caption":"Toggle thumbnail","created":"20260305110602317","description":"Switch between thumbnail and full-size view","modified":"20260305110602317","tags":"$:/tags/ViewToolbar","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\define thumb-state() $:/state/file-upload/view-mode/$(currentTiddler)$ <$list filter="[all[current]has[_thumbnail_uri]]" variable="ignore"> <$reveal type="nomatch" state=<<thumb-state>> text="full" tag="span"> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="Show full size" actions="<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<thumb-state>> text='full'/>"> {{$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/icon/expand}} </$button> </$reveal> <$reveal type="match" state=<<thumb-state>> text="full" tag="span"> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="Show thumbnail" actions="<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<thumb-state>> text='thumb'/>"> {{$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/icon/shrink}} </$button> </$reveal> </$list>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/widgets/dropzone":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/widgets/dropzone","text":"/*\ title: $:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/widgets/dropzone type: application/javascript module-type: widget <$file-dropzone> — extends TW's core dropzone widget. On file drop or paste, uploads media files to the server's /files/ directory via POST /api/file-upload and executes action string on completion. Deduplication: computes a short content hash. If a file with the same target path already exists and has the same hash, the upload is skipped. If the hash differs, a unique filename is generated (e.g. grafik-a3f2b1c0.png). Attributes: actions — action string executed on completion. Variables available: data (raw JSON), type, filename, content-hash, canonical-uri, generated-uri (thumbnail URI if processor ran) subfolder — optional override for target subfolder (overrides filter) prop-* — extra fields passed through as action variables \*/ "use strict"; var DropZoneWidget = require("$:/core/modules/widgets/dropzone.js").dropzone; var FileDropZoneWidget = function(parseTreeNode, options) { this.initialise(parseTreeNode, options); }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype = new DropZoneWidget(); FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.execute = function() { var getPropertiesWithPrefix = function(properties, prefix) { var result = Object.create(null); $tw.utils.each(properties, function(value, name) { if(name.indexOf(prefix) === 0) { result[name.substring(prefix.length)] = properties[name]; } }); return result; }; this.properties = getPropertiesWithPrefix(this.attributes, "prop-"); this.subfolder = this.getAttribute("subfolder"); DropZoneWidget.prototype.execute.call(this); }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.handleDropEvent = function(event) { var self = this, dataTransfer = event.dataTransfer; var readFileCallback = function(tiddlerFieldsArray) { self.readFileCallback(tiddlerFieldsArray); }; self.leaveDrag(event); self.resetState(); if(dataTransfer.files && !$tw.utils.dragEventContainsType(event, "text/vnd.tiddler")) { this.wiki.readFiles(dataTransfer.files, { callback: readFileCallback, deserializer: this.dropzoneDeserializer }); } event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.readFileCallback = function(tiddlerFieldsArray) { var allowedTypes = this.getAllowedTypes(); var globalDedup = this.isGlobalDedupEnabled(); var uploads = []; var skipped = []; for(var i = 0; i < tiddlerFieldsArray.length; i++) { var toImport = tiddlerFieldsArray[i]; var type = toImport.type || ""; // Client-side MIME type check if(allowedTypes.indexOf(type) === -1) { continue; } var contentHash = computeHash(toImport.text); // Global dedup: check if any tiddler already has this content hash if(globalDedup) { var globalMatch = this.findTiddlerByContentHash(contentHash); if(globalMatch) { skipped.push({filename: toImport.title, existingTitle: globalMatch}); continue; } } var targetPath = this.computeTargetPath(toImport); var canonicalUri = "/files/" + sanitizePath(targetPath); // Check for existing tiddler with same target path var existingTitle = this.findTiddlerByCanonicalUri(canonicalUri); if(existingTitle) { var existingTiddler = this.wiki.getTiddler(existingTitle); var existingHash = existingTiddler ? existingTiddler.fields._content_hash : null; if(existingHash === contentHash) { // Same content — skip, notify user skipped.push({filename: toImport.title, existingTitle: existingTitle}); continue; } // Different content — make filename unique by appending hash targetPath = appendHashToPath(targetPath, contentHash); canonicalUri = "/files/" + sanitizePath(targetPath); // Check again with the new unique path var existingUnique = this.findTiddlerByCanonicalUri(canonicalUri); if(existingUnique) { skipped.push({filename: toImport.title, existingTitle: existingUnique}); continue; } } var uploadEntry = { filename: toImport.title, targetPath: targetPath, canonicalUri: canonicalUri, contentHash: contentHash, fileType: type }; uploads.push(uploadEntry); var body = { filename: toImport.title, type: type, content: toImport.text, targetPath: targetPath }; this.performUpload(body, { type: type, filename: toImport.title, "content-hash": contentHash }); } // Write batch result to temp tiddler (includes both uploaded and skipped) this.wiki.addTiddler(new $tw.Tiddler({ title: "$:/temp/file-upload/last-upload", type: "application/json", text: JSON.stringify({uploads: uploads, skipped: skipped}) })); // Batch notification for all skipped files if(skipped.length > 0) { this.notifySkipped(skipped); } }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.performUpload = function(body, vars) { var self = this; $tw.utils.httpRequest({ url: "/api/file-upload", type: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "x-requested-with": "TiddlyWiki" }, data: JSON.stringify(body), callback: function(err, responseText) { if(err) { return; } var variables = {}; // Copy base variables for(var key in vars) { variables[key] = vars[key]; } // Copy prop-* attributes for(var pkey in self.properties) { variables[pkey] = self.properties[pkey]; } // Parse response and extract all fields as variables try { var responseData = JSON.parse(responseText); variables.data = responseText; if(responseData.canonicalUri) { variables["canonical-uri"] = responseData.canonicalUri; } if(responseData.generatedUri) { variables["generated-uri"] = responseData.generatedUri; } } catch(e) { variables.data = responseText; } if(self.actions) { self.invokeActionString(self.actions, self, null, variables); } } }); }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.notifySkipped = function(skippedArray) { var lines = []; for(var i = 0; i < skippedArray.length; i++) { lines.push(skippedArray[i].filename + " → " + skippedArray[i].existingTitle); } this.dispatchEvent({ type: "tm-notify", param: "$:/plugins/rimir/file-upload/notifications/skipped", paramObject: { count: String(skippedArray.length), "skipped-list": lines.join("\n") } }); }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.isGlobalDedupEnabled = function() { var tiddler = this.wiki.getTiddler("$:/config/rimir/file-upload/global-dedup"); return tiddler && (tiddler.fields.text || "").trim() === "yes"; }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.findTiddlerByContentHash = function(hash) { var titles = this.wiki.filterTiddlers("[has[_content_hash]]"); for(var i = 0; i < titles.length; i++) { var tiddler = this.wiki.getTiddler(titles[i]); if(tiddler && tiddler.fields._content_hash === hash) { return titles[i]; } } return null; }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.findTiddlerByCanonicalUri = function(uri) { var titles = this.wiki.filterTiddlers("[has[_canonical_uri]]"); for(var i = 0; i < titles.length; i++) { var tiddler = this.wiki.getTiddler(titles[i]); if(tiddler && tiddler.fields._canonical_uri === uri) { return titles[i]; } } return null; }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.getAllowedTypes = function() { var tiddler = this.wiki.getTiddler("$:/config/rimir/file-upload/media-types"); if(tiddler) { try { return JSON.parse(tiddler.fields.text); } catch(e) { // Fall through } } return []; }; FileDropZoneWidget.prototype.computeTargetPath = function(tiddlerFields) { // If subfolder attribute is set, use it directly if(this.subfolder) { return this.subfolder + "/" + tiddlerFields.title; } // If prop-upload-folder is set, use it if(this.properties["upload-folder"]) { return this.properties["upload-folder"] + "/" + tiddlerFields.title; } // Route by MIME type var subfolder = getSubfolderForType(tiddlerFields.type || ""); if(subfolder) { return subfolder + "/" + tiddlerFields.title; } return tiddlerFields.title; }; // Route files to subfolders by MIME type function getSubfolderForType(mimeType) { if(mimeType.indexOf("image/") === 0) { return "images"; } if(mimeType === "application/pdf") { return "pdf"; } return ""; } // Simple hash: djb2 on the first 1024 chars of base64, returned as 8-char hex function computeHash(base64Content) { var sample = (base64Content || "").substring(0, 1024); var hash = 5381; for(var i = 0; i < sample.length; i++) { hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + sample.charCodeAt(i)) & 0xFFFFFFFF; } // Convert to unsigned and then to hex return (hash >>> 0).toString(16).padStart(8, "0"); } // Insert hash before extension: "images/grafik.png" → "images/grafik-a3f2b1c0.png" function appendHashToPath(targetPath, hash) { var lastSlash = targetPath.lastIndexOf("/"); var dir = lastSlash >= 0 ? targetPath.substring(0, lastSlash + 1) : ""; var filename = lastSlash >= 0 ? targetPath.substring(lastSlash + 1) : targetPath; var dotPos = filename.lastIndexOf("."); if(dotPos >= 0) { return dir + filename.substring(0, dotPos) + "-" + hash + filename.substring(dotPos); } return dir + filename + "-" + hash; } function sanitizePath(p) { p = p.replace(/\\/g, "/"); if(p.charAt(0) === "/") { p = p.substring(1); } return p; } exports["file-dropzone"] = FileDropZoneWidget; ","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"widget","created":"20260305110602317","modified":"20260305110602317"}}}
